Under cover of night, John Carter leads a small group to infiltrate Zodanga. They scale the massive carborundum walls using a human ladder. Carter successfully enters the palace grounds and begins coordinating the silent takeover of the city gates.
Stealth/Tension $\rightarrow$ High Stakes Action $\rightarrow$ Calculated Control.
